params.name: Journey to Earth Core
params.description:
On Oct 26, 1864 AD, the novel was first published.
It was an instant hit worldwide and enjoyed global fame once published. With his profound scientific knowledge, Jules Verne cleverly intertwined science with the novel's plot and character portrayal, describing the underground world vividly. The novel leads readers to explore the underground ocean, rainforest, and ferocious beasts, gripping readers' hearts. Jules Verne was hailed as the father of science fiction because of this work.
